title: dactylorchis praetermissa var. macrantha
intro: Dactylorchis praetermissa var. macrantha, also known as the lesser butterfly orchid, is a rare and unique plant species found in the alpine regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of this plant include its potential in treating various health issues due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dactylorchis praetermissa var. macrantha are still being researched, but it is believed to have cardiovascular benefits and may help lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of this plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions, but more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
